$vehicleId..write: auth != null && auth.token.instituteVerified == true && auth.token.instituteId == $instituteId && (auth.token.role == 'admin' || (auth.token.role == 'driver' && newData.child('driverUid').val() == auth.uid))
$vehicleId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['instituteId', 'vehicleId', 'driverUid', 'status', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('instituteId').val() == $instituteId && newData.child('vehicleId').val() == $vehicleId && newData.child('status').val() in ['active', 'offline'] && (newData.child('status').val() == 'offline' || (newData.child('latitude').isNumber() && newData.child('longitude').isNumber() && newData.child('latitude').val() >= -90 && newData.child('latitude').val() <= 90 && newData.child('longitude').val() >= -180 && newData.child('longitude').val() <= 180))
